task: Explore fastapi/routing.py and extract the APIRoute construction pattern as a reusable skill.
Map how fastapi/dependencies/utils.py resolves dependency callables and encode it as a verified skill.
Read fastapi/params.py and write a skill that builds Param subclasses following the same metaclass-free pattern.
Inspect fastapi/security/ and extract the common scheme __call__ pattern as a skill.
Walk fastapi/openapi/utils.py and identify how schemas get inlined; encode the inlining helper as a skill.
List every module inside fastapi/ that imports from starlette and report which starlette names each one imports.
Write a new APIRoute subclass that follows the constructor signature and attribute conventions used in fastapi/routing.py APIRoute, adding a single new attribute called custom_tag.
Find a code pattern that is repeated across at least three files in fastapi/ and write a verified Python skill that abstracts it. Cite the three source files.
